evals.name: flawed-webhook-plan
evals.prompt: Deep review this plan and fix any issues: maestro:plan-review-loop-workspace/test-plans/flawed-plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should identify gaps (vague tasks, missing acceptance criteria, no error handling spec, no payload format, no retry params), fix them, and loop until clean. Should take 2+ rounds.

evals.name: already-good-plan
evals.prompt: Deep review this plan and fix any issues: maestro:plan-review-loop-workspace/test-plans/good-plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this plan is already well-structured and pass in round 1 (or at most minor nit fixes). Should NOT over-iterate on a clean plan.

evals.name: structurally-broken-plan
evals.prompt: Deep review this plan and fix any issues: maestro:plan-review-loop-workspace/test-plans/broken-plan.md
evals.expected_output: Should detect circular dependencies (Task 1->3->2->3), vague Phase 2 tasks, scope explosion. Should fix or flag stall and report to user.
